recent_excerpts: A new Mirai botnet variant, 'Nexcorium,' is exploiting a command injection flaw (CVE-2024-3721) in TBK DVRs and end-of-life TP-Link routers to conscript devices into a distributed denial-of-service (D
Cisco Talos researchers identify the PowMix botnet, active since December 2025, targeting Czech workers with randomized C2 beaconing to evade detection and deploy additional payloads.
A global law enforcement operation involving 21 countries has seized 53 internet domains used to sell DDoS-for-hire services, disrupting a key enabler of cybercrime and online harassment.
